# Codex 源码 LLM Wiki — 入口索引

> OpenAI Codex 真实源码(`Best/codex/`,97-crate Rust workspace + TS/Py SDK)的 agent 可检索知识库。用法:grep 本文件或 `index.json` 里的 id/title/symbol → 打开节点路径读对应自包含 `.md`。证据分级 `[E]/[I]/[U]`,staleness 用 git SHA。机读清单见 `index.json`,规范见 `conventions.md`。
>
> **状态:大纲待 review(已过 4 路独立 subagent 源码校验,170 节点)。** `grouped catalog` 节点逐实例覆盖该组(见每行/groups 的 count)。

## 怎么用
- **agent**:grep id / title / 符号名 → 打开 path;每个节点自包含,不必跨页拼。
- **人**:先读 `spine/overview`,再按需深入 T1/T2。

## T0 — Spine(端到端脊柱,图先行)
- [系统总览与架构](spine/overview.md): codex 是什么 + 分层架构(CLI/TUI/exec/app-server 前端 → core → providers)+ crate 地图 — codex-rs/ · cli/ · core/
- [SQ/EQ 消息架构](spine/sq-eq-architecture.md): Submission Queue → Event Queue 异步循环(Op 进 / EventMsg 出)— protocol/ · core/src/codex_thread.rs · codex_delegate.rs · client.rs
- [进程与 CLI 生命周期](spine/process-lifecycle.md): arg0 dispatch → clap → 子命令分派 → TUI/exec/app-server/mcp-server — cli/src/main.rs · arg0/
- [一次 turn 全过程](spine/turn-end-to-end.md): UserInput → context 装配 → 模型流 → 工具 → event → 续跑 — core/src/session/turn.rs
- [工具调用解剖](spine/tool-call-anatomy.md): router → ToolHandlerKind dispatch → 执行 → event — core/src/tools/router.rs · tools/
- [上下文与 compaction](spine/context-and-compaction.md): 上下文装配 + auto/manual compaction + memory 注入 — core/src/context_manager/
- [Shell 执行流](spine/shell-exec-flow.md): tool call → execpolicy → sandbox transform → spawn → 流式输出 — exec-server/ · sandboxing/

### 端到端 worked traces(具体范例)
- [trace:apply_patch 落盘](spine/trace-apply-patch.md): apply_patch 从 dispatch → 解析 hunk → 沙箱写盘 → diff event — tools/src/apply_patch_tool.rs · apply-patch/
- [trace:MCP 工具调用](spine/trace-mcp-call.md): 外部 MCP server 工具 发现 → 注册 → 调用路由 → 结果回流 — codex-mcp/ · rmcp-client/
- [trace:spawn 子 agent](spine/trace-subagent.md): spawn_agent → 子 agent 循环 → mailbox/wait_agent → 结果回流 — tools/src/agent_tool.rs · core/

## T1 — Surface / Tools(每工具一节点,38 — 已过 audit-A 对照 tool_registry_plan.rs)

### Shell 执行
- [shell](surface/tools/shell.md): 默认 shell 执行(command 数组)— tools/src/local_tool.rs(create_shell_tool)
- [exec_command](surface/tools/exec-command.md): unified-exec 单命令执行(TTY/管道)— tools/src/local_tool.rs(create_exec_command_tool)
- [write_stdin](surface/tools/write-stdin.md): 向运行中的 exec 会话写 stdin 并轮询 — tools/src/local_tool.rs(create_write_stdin_tool)
- [shell_command](surface/tools/shell-command.md): shell-command 模式执行(含审批字段)— tools/src/local_tool.rs(create_shell_command_tool)
- [local_shell](surface/tools/local-shell.md): OpenAI 内建 local_shell 工具(server 语义)— tools/src/tool_spec.rs(create_local_shell_tool)

### 文件 / 编辑
- [apply_patch](surface/tools/apply-patch.md): 补丁编辑(freeform Lark + json 两态)— tools/src/apply_patch_tool.rs · apply-patch/
- [view_image](surface/tools/view-image.md): 把本地图片喂给模型(detail 档位)— tools/src/view_image.rs
- [list_dir](surface/tools/list-dir.md): 目录列举(offset/limit/depth)— tools/src/utility_tool.rs(create_list_dir_tool)

### JS / Code-mode
- [js_repl](surface/tools/js-repl.md): 持久 Node.js kernel(freeform,top-level await)— tools/src/js_repl_tool.rs
- [js_repl_reset](surface/tools/js-repl-reset.md): 重置 js_repl kernel — tools/src/js_repl_tool.rs(create_js_repl_reset_tool)
- [exec (code-mode)](surface/tools/code-mode-exec.md): code-mode 沙箱里跑代码,封装嵌套工具 — tools/src/code_mode.rs · code-mode/
- [wait (code-mode)](surface/tools/code-mode-wait.md): 轮询/终止 code-mode 异步 cell — tools/src/code_mode.rs(create_wait_tool)

### 计划 / 用户交互
- [update_plan](surface/tools/update-plan.md): 维护计划步骤(pending/in_progress/completed)— tools/src/plan_tool.rs
- [request_user_input](surface/tools/request-user-input.md): 向用户提问(多选 + 自由文本)— tools/src/request_user_input_tool.rs
- [request_permissions](surface/tools/request-permissions.md): 请求提权/权限的审批门 — tools/src/local_tool.rs(create_request_permissions_tool)

### 多 agent(V2)
- [spawn_agent (V2)](surface/tools/spawn-agent-v2.md): 任务式 spawn 子 agent(model 继承)— tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_spawn_agent_tool_v2)
- [send_message](surface/tools/send-message.md): 给子 agent 投消息(不触发 turn)— tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_send_message_tool)
- [followup_task](surface/tools/followup-task.md): 投消息并触发子 agent turn(可 interrupt)— tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_followup_task_tool)
- [wait_agent (V2)](surface/tools/wait-agent-v2.md): 等子 agent mailbox 更新/超时 — tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_wait_agent_tool_v2)
- [close_agent (V2)](surface/tools/close-agent-v2.md): 关闭子 agent — tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_close_agent_tool_v2)
- [list_agents](surface/tools/list-agents.md): 列子 agent 及状态 — tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_list_agents_tool)

### 多 agent(V1,legacy)
- [spawn_agent (V1)](surface/tools/spawn-agent-v1.md): V1 spawn(agent id)— tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_spawn_agent_tool_v1)
- [send_input (V1)](surface/tools/send-input-v1.md): V1 给子 agent 发输入 — tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_send_input_tool_v1)
- [wait_agent (V1)](surface/tools/wait-agent-v1.md): V1 等子 agent — tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_wait_agent_tool_v1)
- [close_agent (V1)](surface/tools/close-agent-v1.md): V1 关闭子 agent — tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_close_agent_tool_v1)
- [resume_agent (V1)](surface/tools/resume-agent-v1.md): V1 恢复子 agent — tools/src/agent_tool.rs(create_resume_agent_tool)

### Agent 批处理 jobs
- [spawn_agents_on_csv](surface/tools/spawn-agents-on-csv.md): 按 CSV 行并行 spawn N 子 agent — tools/src/agent_job_tool.rs(create_spawn_agents_on_csv_tool)
- [report_agent_job_result](surface/tools/report-agent-job-result.md): worker 回报 job 结果 — tools/src/agent_job_tool.rs(create_report_agent_job_result_tool)

### MCP 资源
- [list_mcp_resources](surface/tools/list-mcp-resources.md): 列 MCP server 资源 — tools/src/mcp_resource_tool.rs
- [list_mcp_resource_templates](surface/tools/list-mcp-resource-templates.md): 列 MCP 资源模板 — tools/src/mcp_resource_tool.rs
- [read_mcp_resource](surface/tools/read-mcp-resource.md): 读 MCP 资源(server+uri)— tools/src/mcp_resource_tool.rs

### 发现 / API 内建
- [tool_search](surface/tools/tool-search.md): 关键词发现并懒加载 deferred MCP/dynamic 工具 — tools/src/tool_discovery.rs
- [tool_suggest](surface/tools/tool-suggest.md): 提示用户安装/启用 connector/plugin — tools/src/tool_discovery.rs
- [web_search](surface/tools/web-search.md): 联网/缓存搜索(OpenAI 内建)— tools/src/tool_spec.rs(create_web_search_tool)
- [image_generation](surface/tools/image-generation.md): 图片生成(OpenAI 内建)— tools/src/tool_spec.rs(create_image_generation_tool)

### 测试 / 元
- [test_sync_tool](surface/tools/test-sync-tool.md): 集成测试同步/barrier 工具 — tools/src/utility_tool.rs(create_test_sync_tool)
- [MCP namespace 工具](surface/tools/mcp-namespace-tools.md): 外部 MCP server 工具按 namespace 合并(动态)— tools/src/mcp_tool.rs · tool_registry_plan.rs
- [dynamic 工具](surface/tools/dynamic-tools.md): 协议传入的 per-session 自定义工具 — tools/src/dynamic_tool.rs · tool_registry_plan.rs

> 工具系统机制(ToolSpec/ToolHandlerKind/registry/discovery/code-mode)见 `subsystems/core/tool-system.md`。

## T1 — Surface / Slash 命令(按类目 catalog,6 节点,覆盖 42 命令)
- [会话与线程命令](surface/slash-commands/session-thread.md): /new /clear /resume /fork /compact /rename /rollout /quit … — tui/src/slash_command.rs
- [模型与模式命令](surface/slash-commands/model-mode.md): /model /fast /plan /collab /approvals /permissions /experimental /theme /personality … — tui/src/slash_command.rs
- [代码与评审命令](surface/slash-commands/code-review.md): /review /diff /copy /init — tui/src/slash_command.rs
- [工具与集成命令](surface/slash-commands/tools-integrations.md): /skills /mcp /apps /plugins /mention — tui/src/slash_command.rs
- [配置与系统命令](surface/slash-commands/config-system.md): /status /debug-config /settings /memories /title /statusline /sandbox-* /logout /feedback /ps /stop — tui/src/slash_command.rs · feedback/
- [实时与调试命令](surface/slash-commands/realtime-debug.md): /realtime /side /agent /debug-* /test-* — tui/src/slash_command.rs

## T1 — Surface / CLI(3 节点,覆盖 22 子命令 + ~18 全局 flag)
- [子命令 catalog](surface/cli/subcommands.md): exec/login/logout/mcp/plugin/mcp-server/app-server/app/completion/sandbox/debug/execpolicy/apply/resume/fork/cloud/responses*/exec-server/features … — cli/src/main.rs
- [全局 flag](surface/cli/global-flags.md): --model --profile -c/--config --full-auto --sandbox-mode --approval-policy --add-dir --oss --remote … — cli/src/main.rs · utils/cli/src/shared_options.rs
- [exec 非交互模式](surface/cli/exec-mode.md): `codex exec` 标志 + --json + event processors — exec/src/cli.rs · exec/src/lib.rs · docs/exec.md

## T1 — Surface / Config(按区 catalog,8 节点,覆盖 ConfigToml 91 键)
- [模型与 provider 设置](surface/config/model-provider.md): model · model_provider · model_providers · context_window · reasoning_effort/summary/verbosity · personality · service_tier · *_base_url — config/src/config_toml.rs
- [审批与沙箱设置](surface/config/approval-sandbox.md): approval_policy · sandbox_mode · sandbox_workspace_write · permissions · shell_environment_policy · allow_login_shell — config/src/config_toml.rs · docs/sandbox.md
- [认证与账户设置](surface/config/auth-account.md): forced_chatgpt_workspace_id · forced_login_method · cli_auth_credentials_store · mcp_oauth_* — config/src/config_toml.rs
- [MCP 与工具设置](surface/config/mcp-tools.md): mcp_servers · tools · tool_suggest · web_search · tool_output_token_limit · js_repl_* — config/src/config_toml.rs · docs/config.md
- [agents 与 memory 设置](surface/config/agents-memory.md): agents · memories · compact_prompt · project_doc_* — config/src/config_toml.rs
- [UI / TUI / 实时设置](surface/config/ui-tui.md): tui · hide_agent_reasoning · file_opener · audio · realtime* — config/src/config_toml.rs
- [skills/plugins/features 设置](surface/config/skills-plugins-features.md): skills · plugins · marketplaces · features · suppress_unstable_features_warning — config/src/config_toml.rs
- [存储/遥测/杂项设置](surface/config/storage-telemetry-misc.md): sqlite_home · log_dir · history · analytics · feedback · otel · ghost_snapshot · projects · windows · oss_provider · commit_attribution · instructions — config/src/config_toml.rs

## T1 — Surface / App-Server 协议(集成面 catalog,9 节点,覆盖 153 RPC)
- [协议总览](surface/app-server/overview.md): JSON-RPC 2.0 · v1/v2 · ClientRequest/Response/ServerRequest/ServerNotification · 传输 — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs
- [thread 方法](surface/app-server/thread-methods.md): thread/start|resume|fork|archive|list|read|rollback|compact… — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2.rs
- [turn 方法](surface/app-server/turn-methods.md): turn/start|steer|interrupt — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs
- [fs 与 command 方法](surface/app-server/fs-command-methods.md): fs/* · command/exec* — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs
- [config/account/model 方法](surface/app-server/config-account-methods.md): config/* · account/* · model/* · experimentalFeature/* — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs
- [mcp/skills/plugin 方法](surface/app-server/mcp-skills-plugin-methods.md): mcpServer/* · skills/* · plugin/* · marketplace/* · device/key/* — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs
- [server notifications:thread/turn/item](surface/app-server/notifications-thread.md): thread/turn/item 流 ~30 通知 — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs
- [server notifications:account/mcp/fs/hook/realtime](surface/app-server/notifications-system.md): 其余 ~27 通知 — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs
- [server→client requests](surface/app-server/server-requests.md): 审批/elicitation 等 9 个反向请求 — app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs

## T1 — Surface / SDK(6 节点,TS + Python)
- [TS SDK 总览](surface/sdk/ts-overview.md): Codex · Thread · run/runStreamed · CodexOptions/ThreadOptions/TurnOptions — sdk/typescript/src/
- [TS 事件与 item](surface/sdk/ts-events-items.md): ThreadEvent / ThreadItem union — sdk/typescript/src/events.ts · items.ts
- [TS 结构化输出](surface/sdk/ts-structured-output.md): outputSchema · Zod 集成 — sdk/typescript/src/
- [Python SDK 总览](surface/sdk/py-overview.md): Codex(sync/async)· Thread · TurnHandle · AppServerClient — sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/api.py
- [Python 输入与错误](surface/sdk/py-inputs-errors.md): Input 变体 · 错误层级 · retry_on_overload — sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/
- [SDK 架构](surface/sdk/sdk-architecture.md): 两 SDK 都 spawn codex 二进制走 app-server 协议;python-runtime 打包 — sdk/

## T2 — Subsystems / Core(19)
- [工具系统机制](subsystems/core/tool-system.md): ToolSpec/ToolDefinition/JsonSchema/ToolHandlerKind(33)/registry/discovery/dynamic/code-mode — tools/src/
- [Turn 引擎](subsystems/core/turn-engine.md): run_turn 生成器循环 — core/src/session/turn.rs
- [Session 生命周期](subsystems/core/session-lifecycle.md): Session · active_turn · handlers 分派 — core/src/session/
- [Context manager](subsystems/core/context-manager.md): 对话上下文装配 + 注入机制 — core/src/context_manager/
- [指令/prompt 装配](subsystems/core/instruction-assembly.md): core/src/context/ 指令片段(user/permissions/skill/collab…)+ AGENTS.md 组合注入 — core/src/context/ · AGENTS.md
- [Compaction](subsystems/core/compaction.md): auto/manual 压缩 — core/src/
- [长期 Memory](subsystems/core/memory.md): memory 阶段/注入/consolidation — core/src/
- [Tool router 与并行执行](subsystems/core/tool-router.md): 路由 + ToolCallRuntime 并行 DAG — core/src/tools/router.rs
- [Unified-exec 运行时](subsystems/core/unified-exec.md): 后台终端会话/keep-alive/轮询(exec_command·write_stdin 背后)— core/src/unified_exec/
- [Guardian 审批流](subsystems/core/approval-guardian.md): guardian 中介的用户审批请求生命周期 — core/src/guardian/
- [审批/沙箱策略解析](subsystems/core/approval-policy.md): AskForApproval + SandboxPolicy → Decision 自动批准/提示/禁止 — utils/approval-presets/ · protocol/approvals.rs · guardian/policy_template.md
- [Review mode](subsystems/core/review-mode.md): ReviewTask 生命周期 · review session · ReviewRequest/Output — core/src/tasks/review.rs · guardian/review_session.rs
- [Realtime 对话状态机](subsystems/core/realtime-conversation.md): realtime 会话 start→active→end · async vs sync turn — core/src/realtime_conversation.rs
- [Collaboration modes](subsystems/core/collaboration-modes.md): 协作模式切换 · 指令注入 · 工具行为变化 — collaboration-mode-templates/ · core/src/context/collaboration_mode_instructions.rs
- [Ghost commit 与 undo](subsystems/core/ghost-undo.md): baseline 快照 · 冲突检测 · undo task · 状态回退 — core/src/tasks/ghost_snapshot.rs · undo.rs · git-utils/
- [Rollout 持久化](subsystems/core/rollout-persistence.md): JSONL recorder + thread 索引 — rollout/
- [State DB(SQLite)](subsystems/core/state-db.md): 元数据镜像 — state/
- [Thread store](subsystems/core/thread-store.md): local/remote 存储抽象 — thread-store/
- [Trace bundle](subsystems/core/trace-bundle.md): 确定性 replay + reducer — rollout-trace/

## T2 — Subsystems / Exec & Sandbox(11)
- [执行与沙箱总览](subsystems/exec-sandbox/overview.md): SandboxType(4)+ exec 管线 — sandboxing/src/manager.rs
- [exec-server](subsystems/exec-sandbox/exec-server.md): RPC server · process/fs handler · session registry · PTY — exec-server/ · utils/pty/
- [execpolicy DSL](subsystems/exec-sandbox/execpolicy-dsl.md): 策略语言 · 规则 · Decision(Allow/Prompt/Forbidden)· legacy — execpolicy/ · execpolicy-legacy/
- [apply-patch 引擎](subsystems/exec-sandbox/apply-patch-engine.md): parser · Hunk(Add/Update/Delete/Move)· 应用 — apply-patch/src/parser.rs · lib.rs
- [Seatbelt 沙箱(macOS)](subsystems/exec-sandbox/sandbox-seatbelt.md): sandbox-exec + .sbpl — sandboxing/src/seatbelt.rs
- [Linux 沙箱](subsystems/exec-sandbox/sandbox-linux.md): Landlock + seccomp + bubblewrap — linux-sandbox/
- [Windows 沙箱](subsystems/exec-sandbox/sandbox-windows.md): restricted token · ACL · ConPTY — windows-sandbox-rs/
- [Shell 解析与安全](subsystems/exec-sandbox/shell-parsing.md): bash/PowerShell 解析 + danger 检测 — shell-command/
- [Shell 提权](subsystems/exec-sandbox/shell-escalation.md): unix execve 拦截 + 提权协议 — shell-escalation/
- [进程加固](subsystems/exec-sandbox/process-hardening.md): pre-main 加固(ptrace/rlimit/env)— process-hardening/
- [arg0 dispatch](subsystems/exec-sandbox/arg0-dispatch.md): argv[0] 多路复用(apply_patch/linux-sandbox/…)— arg0/

## T2 — Subsystems / MCP(6)
- [MCP client](subsystems/mcp/client.md): 连接外部 MCP server · 发现 · 聚合 — codex-mcp/src/mcp_connection_manager.rs
- [MCP server](subsystems/mcp/server.md): codex 作为 MCP server(codex/codex-reply 工具)— mcp-server/
- [MCP 传输](subsystems/mcp/transports.md): stdio 本地/远端 · HTTP/SSE — rmcp-client/
- [MCP OAuth 与 elicitation](subsystems/mcp/oauth.md): OAuth 发现/登录 · auth status · elicitation 流 — rmcp-client/src/oauth.rs · core/src/mcp_tool_call.rs
- [工具名限定](subsystems/mcp/name-qualification.md): 碰撞消解 + SHA1 hash — codex-mcp/src/mcp_tool_names.rs
- [Connectors](subsystems/mcp/connectors.md): ChatGPT apps connector 发现/缓存 — connectors/

## T2 — Subsystems / Providers & API(10)
- [Provider 抽象总览](subsystems/providers/overview.md): ModelProvider trait · 内建 provider 注册 — model-provider/ · model-provider-info/
- [HTTP client 层](subsystems/providers/http-client.md): 共享 HTTP 传输/重试 · backend API model 类型 — codex-client/ · backend-client/ · codex-backend-openapi-models/
- [OpenAI / ChatGPT provider](subsystems/providers/provider-openai.md): base url · auth · headers — model-provider-info/src/lib.rs
- [Amazon Bedrock provider](subsystems/providers/provider-bedrock.md): Mantle endpoint + SigV4 — model-provider/src/amazon_bedrock/ · aws-auth/
- [OSS provider(Ollama/LMStudio)](subsystems/providers/provider-oss.md): 本地模型 · 拉取/加载 — ollama/ · lmstudio/
- [Responses API](subsystems/providers/responses-api.md): 请求/响应 wire · WireApi::Responses · proxy — codex-api/src/common.rs · responses-api-proxy/
- [SSE 流式](subsystems/providers/sse-streaming.md): SSE 解析 · ResponseEvent — codex-api/src/sse/responses.rs
- [重试与错误](subsystems/providers/retry-errors.md): RetryConfig · ApiError 分类 · rate limit — codex-api/src/error.rs · provider.rs
- [Auth 层](subsystems/providers/auth-layer.md): AuthProvider · Bearer · command-backed · SigV4 — codex-api/src/auth.rs
- [模型 catalog](subsystems/providers/model-catalog.md): models-manager · models.json · ModelInfo · prompt cache — models-manager/

## T2 — Subsystems / TUI(9)
- [TUI 架构](subsystems/tui/architecture.md): App · run loop · tokio::select 三源 · alt-screen — tui/src/app.rs · docs/tui-alternate-screen.md
- [事件系统](subsystems/tui/event-system.md): AppEvent · 通道 — tui/src/app_event.rs
- [流式渲染管线](subsystems/tui/streaming-pipeline.md): markdown collector → controller → commit_tick → render · chunking 策略 — tui/src/streaming/ · docs/tui-stream-chunking-*.md
- [ChatWidget](subsystems/tui/chatwidget.md): transcript · HistoryCell — tui/src/chatwidget.rs · history_cell.rs
- [Bottom pane](subsystems/tui/bottom-pane.md): composer · popup 栈 · paste-burst — tui/src/bottom_pane/ · docs/tui-chat-composer.md
- [Overlays 与 dialogs](subsystems/tui/overlays-dialogs.md): 审批/elicitation/pager/picker/exit-confirm — tui/src/bottom_pane/ · docs/exit-confirmation-prompt-design.md
- [Status surfaces](subsystems/tui/status-surfaces.md): account/rate-limit/session 卡片 — tui/src/status/
- [Onboarding](subsystems/tui/onboarding.md): welcome/trust/login — tui/src/onboarding/
- [渲染与主题](subsystems/tui/rendering-theming.md): markdown_render · highlight · ansi-escape · wrapping — tui/src/render/ · ansi-escape/

## T2 — Subsystems / App-Server(4)
- [Message processor](subsystems/app-server/message-processor.md): 请求分派 — app-server/src/codex_message_processor.rs
- [会话管理](subsystems/app-server/session-management.md): thread/turn 服务端生命周期 — app-server/src/
- [传输层](subsystems/app-server/transport.md): stdio vs websocket · stdio-to-uds — app-server/src/transport/ · stdio-to-uds/ · uds/
- [App-server 客户端库](subsystems/app-server/client-libs.md): Rust 客户端(tui/exec 消费)+ 测试/调试 client — app-server-client/ · app-server-test-client/ · debug-client/

## T2 — Subsystems / Config & Auth(8)
- [配置加载](subsystems/config-auth/config-loading.md): 优先级 · layer stack · 深合并 — config/src/state.rs · merge.rs
- [Profiles 与项目信任](subsystems/config-auth/profiles.md): profiles · project trust — config/src/profile_toml.rs
- [认证流程](subsystems/config-auth/auth-flows.md): ChatGPT OAuth · device code · api key — login/src/auth/manager.rs · docs/authentication.md
- [凭据存储](subsystems/config-auth/credential-storage.md): file/keyring/auto/ephemeral · device-key · secrets — login/ · keyring-store/ · secrets/ · device-key/
- [Hooks 系统](subsystems/config-auth/hooks.md): AfterAgent / AfterToolUse 生命周期钩子 + 触发点 — hooks/
- [Skills 系统](subsystems/config-auth/skills.md): 加载/渲染/注入 — skills/ · core-skills/ · docs/skills.md
- [Plugins 系统](subsystems/config-auth/plugins.md): manifest · marketplace · 安装 — plugin/ · core-plugins/
- [Feature 系统](subsystems/config-auth/features-system.md): feature flag 门控机制(全 catalog 见 reference)— features/

## T2 — Subsystems / Cloud(3)
- [Cloud tasks](subsystems/cloud/cloud-tasks.md): 远端任务 list/apply/review — cloud-tasks/
- [Cloud task API](subsystems/cloud/cloud-task-api.md): CloudBackend trait · TaskSummary/Status/ApplyOutcome — cloud-tasks-client/
- [Cloud requirements](subsystems/cloud/cloud-requirements.md): 企业托管 config(签名缓存)— cloud-requirements/

## T2 — Subsystems / Platform(8)
- [Git utils](subsystems/platform/git-utils.md): ghost commit · branch · apply · baseline — git-utils/
- [File search](subsystems/platform/file-search.md): 模糊文件搜索 — file-search/
- [遥测 / OTEL](subsystems/platform/telemetry-otel.md): 导出器(Statsig/OTLP)· 指标 — otel/
- [Analytics](subsystems/platform/analytics.md): events · facts · reducer — analytics/
- [Network proxy](subsystems/platform/network-proxy.md): MITM 代理 · 网络策略 — network-proxy/
- [终端探测](subsystems/platform/terminal-detection.md): 终端能力探测 — terminal-detection/
- [Realtime 传输(WebRTC/WS)](subsystems/platform/realtime.md): realtime-webrtc + realtime websocket 传输层 — realtime-webrtc/ · codex-api/endpoint/
- [Agent identity](subsystems/platform/agent-identity.md): agent 身份 + install-context — agent-identity/ · install-context/

## T3 — Reference
- [协议 Op catalog](reference/protocol-op.md): 34 个 Submission/Op 变体逐一 — protocol/src/protocol.rs
- [协议 Event catalog:生命周期/turn/exec/patch](reference/protocol-event-lifecycle.md): EventMsg 约前半(生命周期/turn/exec/patch/审批)— protocol/src/protocol.rs
- [协议 Event catalog:streaming/collab/realtime/mcp](reference/protocol-event-streaming.md): EventMsg 约后半(delta/collab/realtime/mcp)— protocol/src/protocol.rs
- [协议 items / approvals 类型](reference/protocol-items.md): ResponseItem · approvals · permissions — protocol/src/items.rs · approvals.rs · permissions.rs
- [SessionTask 变体目录](reference/session-tasks.md): SessionTask trait + 变体(Review/Compact/Undo/GhostSnapshot/Regular/UserShell)— core/src/tasks/mod.rs
- [数据模型](reference/data-model.md): 核心共享类型 — protocol/ · core/
- [关键类型索引](reference/key-types.md): 各子系统 load-bearing struct/trait 索引 — codex-rs/
- [Crate 索引](reference/crate-index.md): 97 crate(含 utils/* ~25)一句话目录 — codex-rs/Cargo.toml
- [Feature flag 目录](reference/feature-flags.md): 62 个 flag 按 stage 全 catalog — features/src/lib.rs
- [环境变量目录](reference/env-vars.md): CODEX_* 等 — codex-rs/
- [术语表与 codename](reference/glossary.md): SQ/EQ · rollout · ghost commit · seatbelt · landlock · guardian · code-mode …
- [不确定项日志](reference/uncertainty.md): `[U]` 汇总

## 工具
- [lint 工具](tools/lint.mjs): L1 机械校验(待落地)· [reconcile](tools/reconcile.mjs): 登记新节点
